query: SELECT id, title, meetingStatus, LEFT(minutesSummary, 200) as summary_preview, LEFT(decisionsJson, 200) as decisions_preview, LEFT(extractedTasksJson, 200) as tasks_preview, startedAt, endedAt FROM meetings ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT id, title, meetingStatus, LEFT(minutesSummary, 200) as summary_preview, LEFT(decisionsJson, 200) as decisions_preview, LEFT(extractedTasksJson, 200) as tasks_preview, startedAt, endedAt FROM meetings ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
